meta.idea_engine_pin: d165876 (proposal landed at main d165876 via idea-engine PR #434, merged 2026-07-15T08:16:04Z; outbox block appended in commit 24514fc)
meta.hermetic: the runner reads ONLY this fixtures.json; zero repo/network reads at verdict time; every registered constant below is copied verbatim from the PROPOSAL 070 block / idea file, and every MEASURED constant was re-verified FIRSTHAND at venture-lab 520bdfc (= origin/main, unmoved) BEFORE this file was written: ultramarine.md 27,890 words total with a 57-word front block before '## 1. Lapis' (awk rule), part-one.md 8,809 words (part-two 9,189, part-three 9,850), dormouse.en.md 'Word count: 634' pin + exactly 12 '[Spread' blocks + 116-word header before Spread 1, comet-biscuit book-1 'Format: 32-page picture book - 15 spreads' + 'Word count: ~520' verbatim, and the claim-5 negative (no committed sentence anywhere in docs/publishing/ or OWNER-QUEUE.md prices the sample window) - ALL MATCHED, zero harvest anomalies

model.budget: B = ceil(alpha * (F + S)) display units, counted from byte one; the artifact's own front matter F spends the first F units of the budget before the story's S units start
model.conversion: C = q^(F + k) * 1[F + k <= B and k <= S] - a browsing reader survives each unit read with probability q (geometric attrition) and converts iff k hook story-units are read INSIDE the budget; conversion is priced up to a positive browse-to-sample constant that cancels from every ratio and indicator the decision reads
model.units: prose = 250-word screens, ceiling division (NOVELLA 27,890 w -> 112 screens; EPISODE 8,809 w -> 36 screens); picture books = pages, hook stated in spreads with 1 spread = 2 pages; quantization is a declared convention, knife-edge cells are named and the decision rule may not rest on one

theorems.T1: exponential toll - within the budget, C(F)/C(0) = q^F exactly: front matter is a per-unit multiplicative tax, never additive; log C affine in F with slope log q
theorems.T2: viability cliff - at F > B - k the sample contains no reachable hook and C = 0 for every q; the exact minimum viable story length S*(F, k, alpha) = smallest integer S with S >= k and alpha*(F+S) > F + k - 1; at alpha = 1/10 this is S* = 9F + 10k - 9, so each front unit raises the minimum viable book by (1-alpha)/alpha = 9 units
theorems.T3: reader-mixture log-convexity - for any nondegenerate mixture q ~ mu, survival S(n) = E[q^n] is strictly log-convex: S(n)S(n+2) > S(n+1)^2; S(n) > S(1)^n for n >= 2 (single-q deep-toll numbers are overstatement bounds); implied per-unit hazard non-increasing (increasing measured hazard falsifies the whole mixture-of-geometrics class)

measured_constants.comet_biscuit_format: 32-page picture book - 15 spreads (32 = 2 front pages + 15 spreads x 2 pages, internally exact)

NOVELLA.S_derivation: ceil(27890/250) = 112 screens (27890/250 = 111.56, not a quantization knife-edge)

PB15.S_derivation: committed pin '32-page picture book - 15 spreads': 15 spreads x 2 pages = 30 story pages

PB12.S_derivation: dormouse committed 12-spread body: 12 x 2 = 24 story pages

policies.labels: prose STORY-FIRST = 1 (title/copyright/content-note merged on one screen), FRONT-LOADED = 4 (title, copyright, dedication + content note, TOC); picture book legal minimum = 2 (title + copyright, per the committed 32 = 2 + 30 arithmetic), FRONT-LOADED = 4
policies.F0_note: F = 0 is a THEOREM REFERENCE point for T1 only (C(F)/C(0) = q^F), never a policy row and never decision-bearing (convention C2)

mixture_T3.note: skimmer q = 3/5 w.p. 1/2, reader q = 49/50 w.p. 1/2 - pinned two-point mixture for the T3 legs only

sstar_scan.note: T2 formula gate: closed form vs brute scan at every (grid alpha, F in 1..5, k in {1,2,3,5})

reject.clause_i: FRONT-LOADED (F = 4 prose / 4 PB) cliffs (C = 0 exactly) on >= 3 of the 4 committed formats at the decision cell
reject.clause_ii: the NOVELLA's front-loaded toll C(STORY-FIRST)/C(FRONT-LOADED) = C(F=1)/C(F=4) >= 11/10 at the decision cell
reject.reading: both clauses AND-ed, exact-rational comparisons at (alpha = 1/10, q = 19/20, k = 3 screens / 1 spread)

decision.invalid: any G1-G6 gate failure (controls misbehaving - report, no ruling)

approve.clause_i: zero front-loaded cliffs across all 4 committed formats at alpha = 1/10
approve.reading: both AND-ed; mutually exclusive with REJECT by arithmetic

null_axes: the alpha axis: the real platform sampler is an invented-but-pinned model constant - ONE free observation of an actual Look-Inside cut on any published title settles it, no owner spend
the quantization axis: a knife-edge cell straddling a decision band
twin-arm disagreement surviving the INVALID diagnosis
theorem failure without gate failure: a wrong drafter hand-claim becomes a finalized corrected law, never a silent bad gate
decision.knife_edge_exclusion: margin m = B - (F + k); m = 0 cells are named fragile and excluded from decision clauses; the registered instance is EPISODE at F = 1 (story screens in sample = 3 = k exactly); the runner re-verifies that NO decision clause rests on any m = 0 cell

PB12_legal_minimum.note: under the cliff even at legal minimum - a format decision, not an assembly one; cliffed at every F in {2,3,4}

EPISODE_knife_edge.note: margin-0, named fragile, excluded from decision clauses; cliffs from F = 2

anchors_g6.alpha_fifth_witness: at alpha = 1/5 every committed format clears even front-loaded (the APPROVE-side witness on the cliff axis)

T3_depth_toll_endpoints.note: disclosed rounded - compared at stated precision (4 dp)

gates.G1: twin arms - Arm B (brute unit walk) equals Arm A (closed form) on every rational at every grid cell (all format x alpha x q x k x F, F = 0 reference included)
gates.G2: T1 - within-budget ratio C(F+1)/C(F) = q exactly, constant across F, every format x q (pairs where both cells are within budget); and C(F)/C(0) = q^F on within-budget pairs
gates.G3: T2 - cliff indicator single-threshold in F (monotone non-increasing, scanned F = 0..12); S* closed form (9F + 10k - 9 at alpha = 1/10; general strict-inequality form at all grid alpha) matches the brute S = 1..400 scan at every (alpha, F in 1..5, k in {1,2,3,5})
gates.G4: T3 - pinned mixture: strict log-convexity S(n)S(n+2) > S(n+1)^2 for n in 0..29; S(n) > S(1)^n for n in 2..29; depth-decreasing toll S(n)/S(n+3) strictly decreasing over n in {1, 4, 8, 16} - all exact Fractions
gates.G5: hand worlds - derived by hand in the idea file, reproduced exactly
gates.G6: battery - q = 1 => every within-budget C = 1 and every toll = 1; alpha = 1 => no cliff anywhere with S >= k; C monotone non-increasing in F everywhere; census anchors (anchors_g6) reproduced verbatim (G6 gating of the disclosed census is P070's OWN registered text - a registered departure from the V082-C10 never-gate norm, applied as registered)

arm_r.role: REPORTING-ONLY - NO statistical gate rides Arm R; a trace drifting from the exact value is a named finding, never a ruling
arm_r.cells_note: the three surviving decision-grid cells (cliffed cells are C = 0 exactly - nothing for an MC to estimate); registered as 'seeded reader-trace MC at 3 cells' in the P070 outbox block; the specific cell choice is fixture-level convention C7, disclosed here before the runner existed
arm_r.draw_discipline: one uniform draw per unit-read attempt; a trace ends at abandonment, conversion, or budget exhaustion; draw counts recorded per leg (reporting)
arm_r.seed_allocation_note: seeds 20261620-623 are the drafter's registered set and ARE the session seed set (the V077-V082 precedent; no new allocation); 20261610-613 are P069/V082's registered set and the gap 20261614-619 stays the disclosed in-flight buffer, unused; registry high-water after this slice: 20261623 (reserved; highest read 20261622)

battery.twin: Arm B is an INDEPENDENTLY-WRITTEN brute unit-walk enumeration (walks the truncated artifact unit by unit, multiplying survival and counting story units to the hook - never via the closed form) and must reproduce every Arm-A closed-form number EXACTLY
battery.evaluators: twin independently-written decision evaluators (one fed Arm-A numbers, one fed Arm-B numbers) must agree on the ruling token
battery.byte_identity: stdout + results.json byte-identical across two full process runs (external diff + sha256; Arms A/B platform-independent exact rationals; Arm R pinned to a stated CPython minor)

conventions.C1: unit ceilings: prose screens = ceil(words/250); B = ceil(alpha*(F+S)) computed on exact Fractions (two independent ceil implementations, one per arm); PB hook k stated in spreads and converted to pages as 2 per spread before any arithmetic
conventions.C2: F = 0 is a theorem reference point for T1/G2 only - never a policy row, never decision-bearing
conventions.C3: the decision toll (REJECT clause ii / APPROVE clause ii) = C(NOVELLA, F=1) / C(NOVELLA, F=4) at the decision cell - STORY-FIRST = F = 1 per the registered policy labels
conventions.C4: within-budget ratio gates (G2) quantify over pairs where BOTH cells are within budget (the ratio is undefined at C = 0); cliff cells enter the census, not the ratio gates
conventions.C5: knife-edge ledger: the runner enumerates EVERY margin-0 cell over the full grid and publishes the ledger; decision clauses are re-verified to rest on none of them (the registered exclusion instance is EPISODE F = 1)
conventions.C6: S* brute scan: min S in 1..400 with S >= k and F + k <= ceil(alpha*(F+S)); closed form: S* = floor((F + k - 1)/alpha - F) + 1 (strict inequality: ceil(x) >= m iff x > m - 1); the alpha = 1/10 specialization 9F + 10k - 9 is gated separately
conventions.C7: Arm-R cell choice: the three surviving decision-grid cells (NOVELLA F=1, NOVELLA F=4, EPISODE F=1); q drawn as float(19/20) = 0.95 (exactly representable); estimand = converted traces / total traces per cell
conventions.C8: seed discipline: the ONLY random.Random constructors in the runner are the three registered read seeds in pinned order (main, stability, presentation); the aux seed 20261623 appears only in this fixture and the never-read assertion (constructor registry counted)
conventions.C9: the presentation seed shuffles the PUBLISHED Arm-R table's row order only (a list of row keys), touching no numeric value
conventions.C10: floats published beside Fractions are repr(float(Fraction)) - presentation only, never compared; disclosed-rounded anchors (the T3 endpoints) compared at stated precision (4 dp); every exact disclosed anchor compared as an exact rational; any mismatch is BOTH a G6 gate failure (P070's registered text) AND a named first-class anomaly (A1, A2, ... convention)
conventions.C11: canonical serialization: results.json written with sort_keys=True, ensure_ascii=True, indent=2, LF newlines; Fractions serialized as 'p/q' strings
